plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-273 RP08.P01.M02.S09-RP08.P01.M04.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-273 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP08.P01.M02 type/shape tail (optional field registry through closeout handoff), the full M03 primary model/storage cycle (22 rows including documentation entry and index export check), and the M04 secondary workflow head (6 rows) across three sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H08), Claude review packet (C08), and CP00-274 handoff, without opening email/Office-native/sync/filing runtime, ownership drift, unit-test runtime paths, state writes, object storage, command runtime execution, Hermes runtime receipts, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-273 is a descriptor-only RP08 email-dms-core model/storage slice pack (risk B, 40 units, RP08.P01.M02.S09-RP08.P01.M04.S06). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly NOT asserted: manifest.json shows production_ready:false / status:implemented_pending_review and command-evidence.json shows production_ready:false with gate_outcome:implementation_gates_passed_post_review_closeout_pending, all recorded validation/test/contract commands at exit_code 0. The live closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-273 entry, contracts/email-dms-core-contract.json (current_pack + program + historical bindings tail), the registry pack binding, and the manifest plan_binding_snapshot all agree on risk_class B, unit_count 40, range, and the deliverable distribution (implementation:23, ui:5, fixture:2, test:6, hermes_evidence:2, claude_review:2) and micro-title distribution (12/22/6), which reconcile to 40. registry.js/service.js/validators.js are pure frozen-descriptor builders and validators with no I/O, DB, network, object storage, or state writes; row guards (descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false, plus tenant/matter/state/validation/fixture/test/hermes/claude guards) are backed by ROW_EXTRAS and asserted by the model test and the rp08 validator. Read-only reviewer boundary is preserved end-to-end: claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false in contract, descriptor, and no-write attestation. CP178+ hardening is satisfied: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit_code 0, valid non-zero JSON stdout, no fenced/tool-shaped output), forbidden_review_evidence enumerated, invalid_review_attempts empty, and post-review artifacts (raw-output, receipt, claude-review-result, adjudication, construction-inspection) are correctly absent pre-review. Hermes patterns appear only as descriptor evidence packet/receipt shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false), not product runtime. No P0/P1/P2 findings; one P3 transparency note on a scope-helper artifact classification that does not affect pack contents or closeout.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json dual-classifies new-session-handoff.md as both implementation and unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md is listed in both untracked_implementation_files (line 96) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 102). The manifest's worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved lists only the .docx and the ldip invalid-attempt JSON, not this handoff note. This is a cosmetic classification ambiguity in the scope-helper artifact only: the pack's actual implementation_refs are the eight tracked email-dms files, active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, and validation-report.json confirms no active implementation files were omitted. It has no bearing on pack contents, the descriptor-only boundaries, or the production_ready determination.
findings.recommendation: Optionally reconcile the scope generator so a plan-handoff note is classified in a single category (treat docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md as unrelated dirty rather than untracked implementation). Non-blocking; no change required for CP00-273 closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-273 email dms core model storage slice descriptor pack
